title: Sales Performance
description: Revenue, customers and fulfilment at a glance — net-of-returns revenue trend with month-on-month KPI cards, top customers and items, revenue by item group, a quotation-to-order funnel, and an overdue-deliveries action list. Built from submitted Sales Invoices, Quotations and Sales Orders. Amounts are in base currency; POS invoices are reflected only after POS closing.
